stemHtml:
What is true about the following events?

(1) An aircraft has a near miss with another aircraft that nearly led to a collision
(2) Another aircraft sustains damage to landing gear and fuselage

options.a: (1) is a serious incident because a collision nearly occurred. (2) is an accident because the fuselage was damaged.
options.b: (1) is an accident because a collision nearly occurred. (2) is a serious incident because the fuselage was damaged.
options.c: (1) is an accident. (2) is an accident.
options.d: (1) is a serious incident. (2) is a serious incident.
